basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Junior Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has officially announced the Junior Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification has been published on the official IIT Delhi website. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria and hold a graduate degree in an appropriate discipline with at least 5 years of relevant administrative experience, along with proficiency in MS Word, MS Excel, and MS PowerPoint, can submit their applications through Email on or before 07-07-2026. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for age limit

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline with at least 5 years of experience in relevant administrative work
qualification.details: Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline. At least 5 years of experience in relevant administrative work, including office filling, record management, and dispatch of official documents/files. Proficiency in MS Word, MS Excel, and MS PowerPoint. Desirable Skills: Experience in office administration and documentation. Knowledge of file management and correspondence handling. Good communication and organizational skills. Ability to work efficiently with a computer.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Delhi Junior Project Assistant (Admin.) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Delhi Junior Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline. At least 5 years of experience in relevant administrative work, including office filling, record management, and dispatch of official documents/files. Proficiency in MS Word, MS Excel, and MS PowerPoint. Desirable Skills: Experience in office administration and documentation. Knowledge of file management and correspondence handling. Good communication and organizational skills. Ability to work efficiently with a computer.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Junior Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 07 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) position at IIT Delhi.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in an appropriate discipline and possess at least 5 years of relevant administrative experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) role?
faq.answer: The salary for this position ranges from Rs. 29,290 to Rs. 38,220 per month, plus HRA at 30% per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete bio-data and required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key skills required for the Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) position?
faq.answer: Proficiency in MS Word, MS Excel, and MS PowerPoint is essential. Experience in office administration, file management, and good communication skills are also desirable.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Jr. Project Assistant (Admin.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves short-listing of candidates followed by an online or offline interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Delhi for recruitment-related information?
faq.answer: The official website for recruitment information at IIT Delhi is http://ird.iitd.ac.in/rec.
